headline: AppLovin Stagwell Alliance Tests Axon’s AI Across Mobile And CTV
summary: AppLovin (NasdaqGS:APP) has entered a partnership with Stagwell to integrate its Axon ad technology into Stagwell's media offerings. The collaboration is designed to extend Axon's reach across mobile and connected TV, with distribution to over 1b daily users. The agreement introduces AI driven campaign optimization and reporting tools to Stagwell's client base across multiple ad formats. For you as an investor, this partnership sits at the intersection of mobile advertising, connected TV...

headline: Adjust: Gaming App Sessions Rose In 2025 As Retention Becomes A Core Growth Strategy
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 10, 2026--Leading measurement and analytics company Adjust released today its Gaming App Insights Report: 2026 Edition, highlighting continued engagement across mobile gaming and a growing industry focus on long-term player value. Global gaming app sessions saw an increase vs. last year with the paid-to-organic ratio rising 61% globally, reflecting evolving acquisition dynamics as studios balance user growth with strategies designed to deepen engagement and retention.
